# C7 Casinos

> Premium crypto casino with provably-fair games, real-time payouts, and full on-chain transparency.

C7 Casinos (Season Casinos) is a next-generation crypto casino offering
provably-fair games on USDT, ETH, BTC and BNB. Every game round is
HMAC-SHA256 verifiable, deposits and withdrawals are on-chain, and the
platform supports Web3 wallets (MetaMask, WalletConnect) alongside
email auth.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with featured games, live wins ticker and bonus offers.
- [Login](/login): Email or wallet sign-in.
- [Blog](/blog): Crypto, casino strategy, news and how-to guides.
- [Privacy Policy](/quick/privacy-policy): How we handle user data.
- [Terms of Service](/quick/terms): Player terms and conditions.

## Games

C7 Casinos ships nine provably-fair in-house games: Plinko, Mines,
Crash, Dice, Wheel, Limbo, Hilo, Keno and Coinflip. All bets settle
server-side via Supabase Edge Functions; client seeds are user-rotatable
and server seeds are revealed after each round.

## Optional

- [Provably Fair](/dtx/provably-fair): Verify any past round.
- [Responsible Gaming](/dtx/responsible-gaming): Player protection tools.
